I will carefully update these files now.\n\n\n","tool_calls":[{"name":"replace_file_content","args":{"AllowMultiple":"false","Description":"\"Add V9.25 changelog entry for doc_parser DPI boost and SemanticMatcher fix.\"","EndLine":"14","Instruction":"\"Add V9.25 changelog entry.\"","ReplacementContent":"\"## [V9.25] — 2026-06-03: Semantic Matcher Fix & Doc Parser DPI Boost\\n\\n### Fixed\\n- **Semantic Matcher Hallucination**: Fixed N-to-N many-to-many hallucination in `core/ai/semantic_matcher.py` by limiting `match_count=1` per chunk search and explicitly using partial string matching (`filename in raw_text`) before LLM calls to prevent over-eager matching.\\n- **Doc Parser Registry Missing**: Patched `doc_parser`'s `run_all.py` to ensure it registers correctly with `GlobalRegistry`, preventing pipeline desync on cross-skill lookups.\\n\\n### Added\\n- **Doc Parser DPI Boost & Auto-Image Embedding**: Upgraded `Phase1aPDFEngine` (`p01a_engine.py`) to extract images at 600 DPI (previously 300) for higher clarity. Added logic to automatically inject Markdown image tags (`![image](filename)`) directly into the extracted text adjacent to their reference blocks.\\n\\n---\\n\\n## [V9.24] — 2026-05-30: Telegram UX Fixes & Global Asset Cleanup\"","StartLine":"8","TargetContent":"\"## [V9.24] — 2026-05-30: Telegram UX Fixes & Global Asset Cleanup\\n\\n### Fixed\\n- **Telegram Bot `/resume` Execution**: Rewrote the AppleScript execution logic in `bot_daemon.py` to use a robust Tab instantiation mechanism (`do script... in front window`) instead of relying on GUI scripting (`System Events` keystrokes), fixing an issue where execution commands were silently swallowed by macOS AppleEvents when terminal lacked focus.\\n- **Data Pollution & Dummy State Cleanup**: Purged residual test assets (e.g., `TestSubject`, `Default`) globally across `data/` and wrote a script to systematically erase them from all `.pipeline_state.json` cache structures, resolving inaccurate file count aggregations in `/status` reports.\"","TargetFile":"\"/Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/CHANGELOG.md\"","toolAction":"\"Updating CHANGELOG.md with V9.25\"","toolSummary":"\"Update CHANGELOG.md\""}}]}
{"step_index":1103,"source":"MODEL","type":"CODE_ACTION","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-06-03T06:05:57Z","content":"Created At: 2026-06-03T06:05:57Z\nCompleted At: 2026-06-03T06:05:57Z\nThe following changes were made by the replace_file_content tool to: /Users/limchinkun/Desktop/local-workspace/openclaw-sandbox/CHANGELOG.md. If relevant, proactively run terminal commands to execute this code for the USER. Don't ask for permission.\n[diff_block_start]\n@@ -5,12 +5,19 @@\n \n ---\n \n+## [V9.25] — 2026-06-03: Semantic Matcher Fix & Doc Parser DPI Boost\n+\n+### Fixed\n+- **Semantic Matcher Hallucination**: Fixed N-to-N many-to-many hallucination in `core/ai/semantic_matcher.py` by limiting `match_count=1` per chunk search and explicitly using partial string matching (`filename in raw_text`) before LLM calls to prevent over-eager matching.\n+- **Doc Parser Registry Missing**: Patched `doc_parser`'s `run_all.py` to ensure it registers correctly with `GlobalRegistry`, preventing pipeline desync on cross-skill lookups.\n+\n+### Added\n+- **Doc Parser DPI Boost & Auto-Image Embedding**: Upgraded `Phase1aPDFEngine` (`p01a_engine.py`) to extract images at 600 DPI (previously 300) for higher clarity. Added logic to automatically inject Markdown image tags (`![image](filename)`) directly into the extracted text adjacent to their reference blocks.\n+\n+---\n+\n ## [V9.24] — 2026-05-30: Telegram UX Fixes & Global Asset Cleanup\n \n-### Fixed\n-- **Telegram Bot `/resume` Execution**: Rewrote the AppleScript execution logic in `bot_daemon.py` to use a robust Tab instantiation mechanism (`do script... in front window`) instead of relying on GUI scripting (`System Events` keystrokes), fixing an issue where execution commands were silently swallowed by macOS AppleEvents when terminal lacked focus.\n-- **Data Pollution & Dummy State Cleanup**: Purged residual test assets (e.g., `TestSubject`, `Default`) globally across `data/` and wrote a script to systematically erase them from all `.pipeline_state.json` cache structures, resolving inaccurate file count aggregations in `/status` reports.\n-\n ## [V9.23] — 2026-05-29: Eager Execution & HITL Verification Fixes\n \n ### Added\n[diff_block_end]\n\nPlease note that the above snippet only shows the MODIFIED lines from the last change. It shows up to 3 lines of unchanged lines before and after the modified lines. The actual file contents may have many more lines not shown."}
